params.name: Cairoo Excellence Cert.
params.description: The award, given only to the most promising and outstanding enterprises under Cairoo, is designed to motivate every dream-driven entrepreneur to climb the peaks of business. Cairoo itself crafted this certificate with meticulous workmanship and sincere sentiment!
